production.playableLoop: Steer a scrapyard magnet, collect six metal scraps, avoid electric spark hazards, and drop the load into the blue recycler before shift time expires.
production.objective: Deposit Scrap 6/6 into the blue recycler before the shift timer reaches zero.
production.failRetry: Touching a spark hazard or timing out enters failed state; Space resets the yard.

catalogSearches: tn asset source search --game-category vehicle --format glb --direct-only --json -> TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH
tn asset source search --game-category environment --format glb --direct-only --json -> TN_ASSET_SOURCE_NO_MATCH

tn asset source search --game-category platformer --format glb --direct-only --json -> Kenney CC0 platformer kit, rejected as mismatched to industrial magnet-yard style
tn asset source search --file-role model --json -> broad loader/city/CC-BY objects, rejected as incohesive and attribution-heavy for this compact procedural slice
assetProvenance.fallback: Direct catalog search did not provide a cohesive low-poly industrial magnet yard kit. Magnet hero, scrap rewards, spark hazards, recycler, rails, bins, warning lights, piles, and HUD are authored as a cohesive procedural mesh kit.
